title: 22 Approving Outgoing Wires
body_text:
22	Approving Outgoing Wires
22.1	Overview of Approving Outgoing Wires
Wires uses MTS branch settings to define outgoing wires authorization levels. See Section 9.5, Entering Branch Settings in MTS.
The number of approvals required for an outgoing wire is based on the wire amount and who creates the wire (in-branch or via MDB / Forge Commercial) as follows:
In-branch Wires
All outgoing wires that users create in-branch require at least one approval, as follows:
ГўВҲВ’
If the wire amount is less than or equal to the value in the MTS Level 2 Authorization field, one approval is required.
ГўВҲВ’
If the wire amount is greater than the value in the MTS Level 2 Authorization field, two approvals are required.
Note:	The MTS Level 1 Authorization field isnГўВҖВҷt considered for in-branch wires.
MemberDirect
ГӮВ®
Business (MDB) or Forge Commercial Wires
Outgoing wires that users create via MDB or Forge Commercial Wires require approval by Wires users, as follows:
ГўВҲВ’
Wire amounts less than or equal to the value in the MTS Level 1 Authorization field donГўВҖВҷt require approval.
Note:	Central 1 recommends that your financial institution review and approve all wires that your business customers create.
ГўВҲВ’
Wire amounts greater than the value in the MTS Level 1 Authorization field, up to and including the value in the Level 2 Authorization field, require one approval.
ГўВҲВ’
Wire amounts greater than the value in the MTS Level 2 Authorization field require two approvals.
Note:	Wires authorization limits apply to all users regardless of their personal limits.
To approve pending outgoing wires, the Wires user must have the ГўВҖВңAuthorize Outgoing TransfersГўВҖВқ permission in MTS and have a 2-step security token assigned to their Client Centre ID. See Section 8.6, Creating a Wires User in MTS. Users canГўВҖВҷt approve their own wire, or a wire they edited.
Note:	Wires users only see wires that correspond to the branches assigned to the user in MTS. See Chapter 9, MTS Branch Management for Wires.
22.2	Approving Outgoing Wires
An authorized user approves a wire as follows:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
Pending Outgoing
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select ГўВҖВңPending OutgoingГўВҖВқ
Enter the code thatГўВҖВҷs generated on your registered 2-step security token, then select
Done
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Entering a 2-Step Security Code
Select the reference number of the wire to approve. See Figure 3. The Status column indicates the number of approvals required.
Figure 3: Select the Wire to Approve
Tip
:	Use the
Show only wires you can approve
filter to display wires that youГўВҖВҷre authorized to approve. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select ГўВҖВңShow only wires you can approveГўВҖВқ
Review the wire. Select
View Personal Information
to view additional wire details, if applicable (e.g., the senderГўВҖВҷs member number, contact information, identification). See Figure 5.
Note:	The Source System field indicates the system the wire was created in (e.g., ГўВҖВңPSDГўВҖВқ if the wire was created in the Wires application, or ГўВҖВңMDBГўВҖВқ if the wire was created in MemberDirect
ГӮВ®
Business (MDB) / Forge Commercial. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select ГўВҖВңView Personal InformationГўВҖВқ
To approve the wire:
Select
Approve Wire
, then select
Yes
when prompted. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Select ГўВҖВңApprove WireГўВҖВқ
A message displays confirming the wire is successfully approved. See Figure 7.
Note:	If a second user must approve the wire, the status displays ГўВҖВң1 Approval RequiredГўВҖВқ. A second user must approve the wire before itГўВҖВҷs sent.
Figure 7: Approved Wire ГўВҖВ“ Second Approval Required
Important
:	Once a wire is fully approved, the funds are sent to the receiving financial institution. The Wires application isnГўВҖВҷt connected to your banking system. Follow your internal procedures to settle with the sender.
Important
:	You canГўВҖВҷt cancel approved outgoing wires in the Wires application. You may be able to submit a recall or amendment. Recalls and amendments are done on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. See Chapter 25, Recalling, Tracing, and Amending Wires. If the wire is future-dated, you may be able to submit a trace request to cancel the wire if submitted before the deadline. See Section, 23.3, Cancelling an Approved Future-Dated Outgoing Wire. Future-dated wire cancellation trace requests are processed on a best- efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed.
Important
:	Wire recalls, amendments, and trace requests are processed on a best-efforts basis and arenГўВҖВҷt guaranteed. Once a wire has been released by Central 1, the receiving bank must voluntarily agree to return the funds. Central 1 will make every reasonable effort to support your request, however, the receiving institution may decline, delay, or be unable to return the funds.
END
